subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turning to the divine Kingdom! The lengthy epistle was considered…. ... make of the Feasts occasions of joy and fellowship reminiscent of the feasts that our forebears used to hold in connection with their commemoration of the Lord's Supper... Thou hast asked regarding the naming of children
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت الهی نامه مفصل ملاحظه گردید با وجود عدم فرصت و مهلت نظر بشدت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @naming of children; of individuals, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @education of children; moral education, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @humility; meekness; lowliness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @service to others; to the Cause of God
